---
title: "Spencer Compton Cavendish"
---

## Spencer Compton Cavendish

**Dates:** (1833-1908)

### Description

politician, known as the Marquess of Hartington until he succeeded his father as 8th Duke of Devonshire in 1891.

### Letters

- Letter from [autumn 1885]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
